历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category/Science were approximately 6836 → 7421 → 11735 → 5834 → 8610, showing significant fluctuations. In 2023, there was a notable backward shift (11735th), followed by a large forward shift in 2024 (5834th), and a return to 8610th in 2025, presenting an overall oscillating pattern. The provincial enrollment plans for Physics Category/Science from 2021 to 2025 were 30 → 30 → 27 → 24 → 31 students respectively. The 2026 plan is 32 students, a slight increase of 1 student (+3.2%) compared to 2025, indicating slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 211 and Double First-Class university. According to the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 56th, with stable rankings in recent years, representing the highest level among domestic political science and law institutions. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (campus safety incidents), but its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 6th (high heat), and the law major has extremely high social attention, with no decrease in application enthusiasm. Law is rated A+ (the only law school in China with an A+ rating), closely aligned with the admissions majors. Majors such as Economics and Applied Psychology rely on interdisciplinary law training.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
In 2026, the law major has high social popularity, and interdisciplinary programs such as Law + Economics dual degree and Law + Finance dual degree are highly attractive. The number of Physics Category examinees in the province in 2026 is 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, indicating a slight reduction in candidate scale. China University of Political Science and Law is located in Beijing, which has strong appeal to Shanxi candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Shanxi is about 2.5%–4.7%, which is moderately high.
8. [Prediction Conclusion] Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 8610th, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+1 student), the slight decrease in provincial Physics Category examinees (–3.4%), and the sustained popularity of law interdisciplinary majors, the estimated minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 8727th, with a range of 8227–9227th.
